author: pr0dt0s
description: Spin up a local http server to access your vault via a web browser.

manifest.author: Pr0dt0s
manifest.description: This plugin lets you spin up a local http server to access your vault via a web browser from any device in your network.
manifest.name: Html Server

name: Html Server

releases.author: Pr0dt0s
releases.description:
# Version 1.0.8 Release

### Changelog:
- Replicate obsidian's file resolver.
- Fixed bug that would impede opening some files inside folders.
- Fixed bug that wouldn't allow opening a route if it wasn't a complete path to the file.
releases.name: v1.0.8

releases.author: Pr0dt0s
releases.description:
# Version 1.0.7 Release

### Changelog:
- Fixed simple auth bug after file resolving changes.
releases.name: v1.0.7

releases.author: Pr0dt0s
releases.description:
# Version 1.0.6 Release

### Changelog:
- Fixed bug that disabled resolving files without needing to specify full path, as Obsidian does .
releases.name: v1.0.6

releases.author: Pr0dt0s
releases.description:
# Version 1.0.5 Release

Changelog:
- Added ability to read variables from the file's metadata/frontmatter to render in the HTML templates.
releases.name: v1.0.5

releases.author: Pr0dt0s
releases.description:
# Version 1.0.4 Release

### Changelog:
- Fixed bug when the configured default View Mode is `Editing View`.
- Added cleanup for used dom elements after rendering.
releases.name: v1.0.4

releases.author: Pr0dt0s
releases.description:
# Version 1.0.3 Release

### Changelog:
- Many quality of life inprovements for the login functionality.
- Fixed the requested changes for publishing to the obsidian community repository.
releases.name: v1.0.3

releases.author: Pr0dt0s
releases.description:
Release v1.0.1

Changelog
Fixed some requested changes to publish in the Obsidian Comunity.
releases.name: v1.0.1
